calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Mar-02-2005 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Brenda Jensen, Plaintiff/Respondent
Danny Wong & Malinda Wong, Defendant/Appellant

This case came on regularly for small claims appeal. The parties were sworn and each testified. Approximately 8 exhibits from the original small claim case were reviewed, including:

at least two checklists
original rental agreement
breakdown from the landlord to Ms. Jensen
letter from the Rent Board dated 8/17/02
undated letter from Ms. Jensen.

Appellants Wong introduced numerous new exhibits at this hearing including photographs. Respondent Jensen introduced

The matter was taken under submission.

JPT Don Drummond, Clerks Jeanie Dobbs/Leelay Chin, not reported (D.525)
